description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat, extended roof covering both the main living area and a carport. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and a small garden with climbing plants. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence and includes mature trees, a hammock, and a small shed, creating a private outdoor retreat. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the walls, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The carport is open on two sides and houses a vehicle, while the main structure is painted in a light color with subtle trim. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear zoning between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, carport, fenced backyard, and asymmetrical window arrangement. Features include a paved entrance, garden, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, carport, and garden with climbing plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, hammock, and small shed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, more windows, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
